# TASKS: #152 — Context-isolated validation for product recipes
<!-- Generated by start-feature-planning | Plan sub-agent output -->

**Intent:** Implement context-isolated judge validation across 3 product recipes

### Dependency Graph
T1 -> T4
T2 -> T5
T3 -> T6
T1 -> T5
T1 -> T6
T4 -> T7
T5 -> T7
T6 -> T7

### Task Breakdown

#### T1: Update judge agent — add Skill tool + validation mode
- **Files:** core/components/agents/judge.md (modify)
- **Details:** Add `Skill` to tools list. Add "Product Artifact Validation Mode" section documenting: receives only artifact path + validation skill name, no drafting context. List validate-product-vision, validate-roadmap, validate-architecture-design as available skills.
- **Depends on:** none
- **Expected Outcome:** judge.md has Skill tool and documented validation mode
- **Verification:** Read judge.md, confirm Skill in tools, confirm validation mode section

#### T2: Create validate-roadmap skill
- **Files:** core/components/skills/validate-roadmap/SKILL.md (create)
- **Details:** Mirror validate-product-vision pattern. Input: roadmap_yaml_path. Checks: thesis non-empty, narrative >=3 paragraphs, >=1 timeline horizon with feature_refs, >=1 feasibility entry with risk_level + technical_risks, approved_brief_ref exists, critical_blockers/open_questions arrays present. Output: ready_for_lock, completeness_score, issues[], checklist.
- **Depends on:** none
- **Expected Outcome:** Skill file exists with complete contract
- **Verification:** Read SKILL.md, verify all check descriptions present

#### T3: Create validate-architecture-design skill
- **Files:** core/components/skills/validate-architecture-design/SKILL.md (create)
- **Details:** Mirror validate-implementation-design pattern. Input: architecture_yaml_path, quality_standards_yaml_path, product_yaml_path. Checks: stack entries have concrete named technologies, NFR rationale traces to NFR Profile, all 7 QP dimensions in quality-standards, debt_baseline initialized, agentic PCAM present if applicable. Output: ready_for_lock, per-check results, issues[].
- **Depends on:** none
- **Expected Outcome:** Skill file exists with complete contract
- **Verification:** Read SKILL.md, verify checks cover stack, NFR, QP, debt_baseline

#### T4: Rebake discover-product — replace product-strategist with judge in Step 6
- **Files:** core/components/recipes/discover-product/reference/intent.yaml (modify), core/components/recipes/discover-product/SKILL.md (rebake)
- **Details:** Add constraint for context-isolated validation. Change Step 6 agent from product-strategist to judge. Contract passes only product_yaml_path and validation_result_path — no market_context, no drafting notes. Update agent boundary table. Update compilation metadata.
- **Depends on:** T1
- **Expected Outcome:** Step 6 uses judge, contract is context-isolated
- **Verification:** Grep Step 6 for "judge", confirm no drafting context in contract

#### T5: Rebake plan-roadmap — add judge validation step
- **Files:** core/components/recipes/plan-roadmap/reference/intent.yaml (modify), core/components/recipes/plan-roadmap/SKILL.md (rebake)
- **Details:** Add constraint for judge validation after roadmap production. Add Step 6.5 between produce-roadmap and scenario-evals. Judge receives only roadmap_yaml_path. If validation fails, present resolution interview. Update status file schema with validate-roadmap task.
- **Depends on:** T1, T2
- **Expected Outcome:** New validation step using judge with context isolation
- **Verification:** Read SKILL.md, confirm new step exists with judge agent

#### T6: Rebake prepare-architecture — add judge validation step
- **Files:** core/components/recipes/prepare-architecture/reference/intent.yaml (modify), core/components/recipes/prepare-architecture/SKILL.md (rebake)
- **Details:** Add constraint for judge validation before lock. Add Step 6c between pre-lock-resolution and lock. Judge receives only architecture_yaml_path + quality_standards_yaml_path. If validation fails, present resolution interview. Update status file schema.
- **Depends on:** T1, T3
- **Expected Outcome:** New validation step using judge with context isolation
- **Verification:** Read SKILL.md, confirm new step exists with judge agent

#### T7: Sync and commit
- **Files:** (deploy)
- **Details:** Run /sync-claude and /sync-droids. Commit all changes. Push to feature branch.
- **Depends on:** T4, T5, T6
- **Expected Outcome:** All components deployed globally, branch pushed
- **Verification:** git status clean, sync reports correct skill/agent counts
